Marketing Lead (B2B / Technical Services)

About DENPAFLUX

DENPAFLUX is building the future of technical consulting and engineering-driven solutions for high-performance industries. We work with complex technologies and demanding applications — and we are now looking for a Marketing Lead who can transform technical excellence into a compelling market presence.

This is a high-impact role with strategic ownership, direct influence on positioning, and the opportunity to shape how DENPAFLUX is perceived in the market.

Your Mission
